title: eupatorium hyssopifolium var. tortifolium
intro: Eupatorium hyssopifolium var. tortifolium, also known as the twisted Joe Pye weed, is a variety of flowering plant in the Eupatorium genus. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that may help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Eupatorium hyssopifolium var. tortifolium include its potential to alleviate fever, treat respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
